The Process

Four steps.
Extraordinary results.

1

Send Your Photos

3–5 clear photos of yourself via Telegram or WhatsApp. Good lighting, a few angles. Phone shots are fine — that's the whole point.

2

Describe Your Scene

Any location, any mood, any lighting. Tokyo rooftop, alpine meadow, luxury studio. Choose from our library or describe anything custom.

3

We Remaster

A human specialist personally oversees every render. Your likeness is composited with professional lighting and atmosphere. Most images in under 30 minutes.

4

Delivered & Revised

Images delivered via direct message. Not happy? We revise. Every package includes multiple rounds until you're satisfied.

One service.

⚙️

Developers & Builders

Our Guarantee

Your truth,
beautifully rendered.

Every image we produce is an honest extension of who you are. No fabricated credentials, no misleading claims. We take your real face, your real presence, and place it into a world that amplifies your brand — truthfully.

This isn't deepfake territory. It's the same craft a location photographer provides. We simply remove the travel, the studio booking, and the cost.

✦

1:1 Likeness, Always

Your face, your body, your presence — rendered accurately and respectfully. We do not alter your appearance without explicit instruction.

↗

No False Advertising

All outputs are for honest brand representation. We don't produce content intended to deceive or misrepresent.

◈

Human on Every Job

A real specialist personally reviews every render. You have a direct line to that person throughout your project.

⚡

Revisions Until You're Happy

Every package includes multiple revision rounds. We don't mark a job done until you're satisfied with the result.

Questions

Things people ask.

What photos do I need to send?
3–5 clear photos of yourself in reasonable lighting. Front-facing and 3/4 angle work best. Everyday phone shots are completely fine — the whole point is you don't need a studio setup to start.
Can I request any location or scene?
Yes. Choose from our scene library or describe anything custom — a specific city, a mood, a lighting style, a branded environment. We'll confirm feasibility before you pay.
How does payment work?
We use PayPal. You'll receive a unique reference code when you start your order — include it in your payment note and we verify it from our end. Simple and direct.
How long does a render actually take?
Most renders at social media resolution are done within 30 minutes. Complex or highly detailed scenes can occasionally take up to 2 hours. We'll always give you an honest ETA upfront.
Is this ethical to use for social media?
Absolutely — with honest use. We produce images of you, in places you could plausibly be, for creative brand expression. The same as any studio or location photographer. We don't support deceptive use and won't produce misleading content.
What does "API access" in the Monthly tier mean?
Monthly and Premium clients can integrate our rendering pipeline into their own tools and workflows. Premium includes direct consultancy to help you build and deploy those tools.
Ready to Reframe?
